value.found_quote: Use Codex code review to get another high-signal review pass on GitHub pull requests. Codex reviews the pull request diff, follows your repository guidance, and posts a standard GitHub code review focused on serious issues. ... If you mention `@codex` in a comment with anything other than `review`, Codex starts a [cloud task](https://developers.openai.com/codex/cloud) using your pull request as context.
value.rationale: The page fully substantiates the claim. It describes Codex integrating with GitHub to review pull requests (triggering via `@codex review` comments or automatically), and also confirms that mentioning `@codex` with any other text starts an async cloud task — exactly matching the claim about reviewing PRs and running async cloud tasks delegated by mentioning @codex. The page presents this as a current, generally available feature with no preview/beta caveats.
